Figma AI

Professional UI design tool with AI-powered design assistance features

9/10Overall Rating
6/10Ease of Use
FreeStarting Price
2012Founded
Free Plan Available

About Figma AI

Figma AI is a ai design platform founded in 2012. It positions itself as “Professional UI design tool with AI-powered design assistance features” and is best suited for UI/UX designers, design teams, product teams. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
TemplatesYes
Drag And DropYes
Brand KitYes
Ai GenerationYes
CollaborationYes
Export FormatsYes
AnimationsYes
Stock AssetsNo
ResponsiveYes
Api AccessYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Industry-standard UI design tool
  • Best-in-class real-time collaboration
  • AI features accelerating design workflows

Cons

  • Steep learning curve for non-designers
  • AI features still maturing
  • Performance with large files
